page_metadata.biotools__summary: hCoCena is an R-package that allows you to integrate and jointly analyse multiple transcriptomic datasets or simply analyse a single dataset if you don't want to do any data integration.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: hCoCena is an R-package that allows you to integrate and jointly analyse multiple transcriptomic datasets or simply analyse a single dataset if you don't want to do any data integration.
